name: cancelled
description: This status means the customer or request has been cancelled and will not proceed further.

name: delayed
description: This status is used when the customer or request has been delayed and is not progressing as scheduled.

name: in-review
description: This status is for customers or requests that are currently under review.

name: new
description: This status indicates a newly created customer or request that has not yet been processed.

name: on-hold
description: This status indicates the customer or request is on hold and temporarily paused.

name: pending
description: This status shows the customer or request is pending further action or review.

name: processing
description: This status means the customer or request is currently being processed.
